message:
refactor(transport): Rename Mock→Sim types in mock.rs source (bd-1z5u)

Renames all Mock-prefixed types to Sim-prefixed in the source file:
- MockTransportConfig → SimTransportConfig
- MockLink → SimLink
- MockNetwork → SimNetwork
- MockSymbolSink → SimSymbolSink
- MockSymbolStream → SimSymbolStream
- MockChannelSink → SimChannelSink
- MockChannelStream → SimChannelStream
- mock_channel() → sim_channel()

Module docstring updated to describe deterministic transport simulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
